description: A deterministic tempo-based RPG battle simulator with status effects and skill combos, reproducing four specific scenario outcomes.

files.role: Data definitions for the RPG system

interfaces.name: Status
interfaces.signature: dataclass Status(type: str, turns: int, stacks: int = 1)
interfaces.description: Represents a status effect applied to an entity.

interfaces.name: Entity
interfaces.signature: dataclass Entity(id: str, name: str, team: str, max_hp: int, hp: int, atk: int, defense: int, spd: int, gauge: float = 0, statuses: list = None, last_skill: str = None, skills: list = None, skill_idx: int = 0)
interfaces.description: Represents a combatant in the battle.

files.role: Logic for skill execution and damage calculation

interfaces.name: calculate_damage
interfaces.signature: def calculate_damage(actor, target, skill_base: int) -> int
interfaces.description: Calculates damage based on the common formula: max(1, atk + skill_base - defense) with shock multiplier.

interfaces.name: apply_skill
interfaces.description: Executes the specific logic for a skill, including damage and status application.

interfaces.name: handle_status_interaction
interfaces.signature: def handle_status_interaction(target, new_status_type: str, turns: int, stacks: int = 1)

files.role: The core tempo-based battle simulation engine

interfaces.name: BattleSimulator
interfaces.description: Manages the battle loop, tempo ticks, turn order, and AI targets.

interfaces.name: BattleSimulator.run
interfaces.description: Executes the battle until a win condition or turn limit is reached. Returns the result dictionary.

files.role: CLI entry point and scenario dispatcher

interfaces.name: main
interfaces.description: Parses --scenario argument and prints the formatted results.

key_points: Damage formula: max(1, atk + base - def), shock gives x1.25 floor
Status interactions: Burn/Freeze conflict, Shock/Poison synergy
Tempo: Gauge adds spd every tick; action when gauge >= 100; priority based on spd > hp > order
Turn definition: Incremented on entity action attempt (including frozen skips)
Combo system: last_skill is cleared by taking damage or freezing
AI: Target lowest HP enemy; rotate through skill list

requirements.text: Implement damage formula including shock multiplier and HP floor of 0
Implement status effects: Burn (5% HP start), Freeze (skip turn), Poison (fixed dmg end), Shock (dmg amp)
Implement status interaction matrix (Burn+Freeze=Evaporate, Shock+Poison=Double stacks)
Implement skill logic including combos (Charge -> Combo Strike, Ignite -> Detonate)
Implement tempo-based turn system with priority (spd -> hp -> reg order)
Implement AI targeting (lowest HP) and skill rotation
Reproduce Scenario 1 golden results: winner: enemy, turns: 23, hp values accurate
Reproduce Scenario 2 golden results: winner: hero, turns: 17, hp values accurate
Reproduce Scenario 3 golden results: winner: hero, turns: 19, hp values accurate
Reproduce Scenario 4 golden results: winner: hero, turns: 29, hp values accurate

acceptance_criteria: The simulator correctly outputs the winner, total turns, and final HP for all 4 scenarios exactly as specified in the golden results.

criteria_checks.criterion: The simulator correctly outputs the winner, total turns, and final HP for all 4 scenarios exactly as specified in the golden results.
criteria_checks.command: python main.py --scenario 1 && python main.py --scenario 2 && python main.py --scenario 3 && python main.py --scenario 4

success_signal.command: python main.py --scenario 1 && python main.py --scenario 2 && python main.py --scenario 3 && python main.py --scenario 4
